overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game, showing the player character walking through a futuristic industrial district with massive spherical storage tanks, scaffolding, and debris. The player approaches an NPC near vending machines, explores a cluttered courtyard with Militech branding, and navigates under large industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial ramp between massive spherical storage tanks

agents.ego_description: walking up a concrete ramp flanked by massive industrial spherical tanks and metal railings

entered.detail: massive spherical industrial tank with metallic surface and support structures
large spherical tank with skull symbol painted on the side
metal safety railing along the right side of the ramp
steep concrete roadway with yellow dividing lines
metal walkway bridge spanning across the top of the ramp

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking up a steep industrial ramp between two massive spherical storage tanks. The environment is overcast and industrial, with metal railings on the right and a concrete roadway marked with yellow lines. An overhead bridge structure is visible at the top of the ramp in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial courtyard with vending machines and small office structures

events.description: exits the narrow ramp into a more open industrial courtyard area
approaches an NPC standing near green vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard toward an NPC standing near vending machines, navigating around cardboard debris

notable_agents.action: standing still near the vending machines wearing a leather jacket with red accents on the sleeves

entered.detail: gray building with dark windows and industrial air conditioning units
green metal structure housing multiple vending machines with glowing displays
scattered cardboard boxes and trash littering the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the ramp into an open industrial courtyard scattered with cardboard debris. On the left is a small office building and a green vending machine booth where an NPC in a leather jacket stands. The large spherical tank remains visible in the background on the right as the player approaches the NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial yard with Militech building and construction materials

events.description: passes the NPC and continues deeper into the industrial courtyard
approaches a large yellow dumpster and external metal staircase

agents.ego_description: walking past the NPC and through the cluttered courtyard toward a large external staircase, passing a yellow dumpster

entered.detail: large industrial building with prominent white 'MILITECH' graffiti on dark green walls
massive yellow industrial dumpster filled with debris and trash
tall external staircase with metal railings leading up the side of a structure
red and orange metal scaffolding structure against the building

segments.scene_description: Having passed the NPC, the player moves through the open courtyard toward a large yellow dumpster. The Militech building dominates the right side with its distinctive graffiti. The area is cluttered with cardboard boxes on pallets, orange scaffolding, and an external metal staircase becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial area with external staircase and construction barriers

events.description: turns left and approaches the external metal staircase
turns around and moves past red and white striped construction barriers

agents.ego_description: navigating around the staircase area, turning left then doubling back past construction barriers

entered.detail: red and white striped plastic barriers blocking off an area
concrete ramp with metal railings leading up to the external staircase

segments.scene_description: The player turns left toward the external metal staircase, then navigates around it past red and white construction barriers. The camera moves in a loop, bringing the large yellow dumpster back into view briefly before focusing on the path ahead between industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: area beneath large spherical tanks with massive support pillars

events.description: moves under the large spherical tank structure into a sheltered area with massive support pillars

agents.ego_description: walking under the industrial structure between massive concrete support pillars, exploring the sheltered area

entered.detail: enormous cylindrical concrete support pillars holding up the spherical tanks above
vehicle covered with a blue tarpaulin sheet
small green utility truck or maintenance vehicle
pallets and containers with various industrial machinery and supplies

segments.scene_description: The player moves under the massive spherical tank structure into a sheltered area dominated by huge concrete support pillars. The lighting becomes darker and more mixed. A vehicle covered with a blue tarp and a small green utility vehicle are visible among scattered industrial equipment and pallets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a steep industrial ascent into the cluttered depths of a sheltered corporate courtyard. It begins by climbing a concrete ramp flanked by massive spherical storage tanks under an overcast sky, moving toward an overhead bridge in the distance. As the camera emerges from the ramp, the scene opens into a debris-strewn courtyard where the player approaches an NPC standing by a green vending machine. The movement then shifts past a Militech building marked with graffiti and orange scaffolding, weaving around red and white construction barriers and a large yellow dumpster. Finally, the camera glides under the shadow of the spherical tank structure into a darker, sheltered area dominated by concrete pillars, blue-tarped vehicles, and scattered industrial equipment.
